metadata.name: IFC Attribute Knowledge Base
metadata.description: IFC属性知识库，用于存储和检索IFC实体属性定义

items.name: Name
items.definition: Optional name for the object, provided by the user.

items.name: Description
items.definition: Optional description for the object, provided by the user.

items.name: GlobalId
items.definition: Assignment of a globally unique identifier within the entire software world.

items.name: Tag
items.definition: The tag (or label) identifier at the particular view.

items.name: ObjectType
items.definition: The type denotes a particular type that indicates the object further.

items.name: PredefinedType
items.definition: Predefined generic type for the wall that is specified in an enumeration.

items.name: OverallHeight
items.definition: Overall measure of the height along the z axis of the local coordinate system of the door.

items.name: OverallWidth
items.definition: Overall measure of the width along the x axis of the local coordinate system of the door.

items.name: ElevationOfRefHeight
items.definition: Elevation above sea level of the reference height used for the building.

items.name: Elevation
items.definition: Elevation of the spatial structure element above a datum.
